wrong_choice_explanations.が: が is a subject marker for new information or emphasis — it doesn't fit here because we're simply stating what the topic (私) is.
wrong_choice_explanations.を: を marks direct objects of verbs — it doesn't fit here because 学生 is not an object being acted upon.
wrong_choice_explanations.に: に indicates direction, time, or indirect location — it doesn't fit here because we're not expressing movement or time.

wrong_choice_explanations.が: が emphasizes the subject as new information — it doesn't fit here because we're talking about today as a known topic.
wrong_choice_explanations.を: を marks direct objects — it doesn't fit here because 雨 is not being acted upon by a verb.
wrong_choice_explanations.で: で indicates location of action or means — it doesn't fit here because we're describing the weather, not an action location.

wrong_choice_explanations.が: が marks the subject for emphasis or new information — it doesn't fit here because we're commenting on この本 as the topic.
wrong_choice_explanations.を: を marks direct objects of transitive verbs — it doesn't fit here because 面白い is an adjective, not a transitive verb.
wrong_choice_explanations.と: と means 'with' or 'and' — it doesn't fit here because we're not expressing accompaniment or listing.

wrong_choice_explanations.が: が emphasizes the subject as new or surprising information — it doesn't fit here because we're simply identifying what Tanaka-san is.
wrong_choice_explanations.に: に indicates direction, time, or location — it doesn't fit here because we're not expressing movement or position.
wrong_choice_explanations.から: から means 'from' or 'because' — it doesn't fit here because we're not indicating origin or reason.

wrong_choice_explanations.が: が marks what is liked in preference expressions — it doesn't fit here because 映画 is the topic we're commenting about.
wrong_choice_explanations.を: を marks direct objects — it doesn't fit here because 好き is an adjective expressing preference, not a transitive verb.
wrong_choice_explanations.の: の shows possession or modification — it doesn't fit here because we're not showing ownership or describing something.

wrong_choice_explanations.が: が emphasizes the subject — it doesn't fit here because we're making a general statement about cats as a topic.
wrong_choice_explanations.を: を marks direct objects of verbs — it doesn't fit here because かわいい is an adjective, not a transitive verb.
wrong_choice_explanations.で: で indicates location of action or means — it doesn't fit here because we're describing a quality, not an action or method.

wrong_choice_explanations.が: が marks the subject for emphasis — it doesn't fit here because we're commenting on Japanese as a general topic.
wrong_choice_explanations.に: に indicates direction, time, or location — it doesn't fit here because we're describing a characteristic, not position or time.
wrong_choice_explanations.と: と means 'with' or 'and' — it doesn't fit here because we're not expressing accompaniment or listing items.

wrong_choice_explanations.が: が emphasizes new information about the subject — it doesn't fit here because we're stating what tomorrow is as a topic.
wrong_choice_explanations.を: を marks direct objects — it doesn't fit here because 休み is not being acted upon by a verb.
wrong_choice_explanations.から: から means 'from' or 'because' — it doesn't fit here because we're not indicating origin or starting point.

wrong_choice_explanations.が: が emphasizes the subject — it doesn't fit here because we're describing the coffee as a topic we're commenting on.
wrong_choice_explanations.を: を marks direct objects of transitive verbs — it doesn't fit here because 熱い is an adjective, not a transitive verb.
wrong_choice_explanations.で: で indicates location of action or means — it doesn't fit here because we're describing temperature, not where an action occurs.

exercises.translation: My mother is good at cooking.

wrong_choice_explanations.が: が marks the subject — it doesn't fit here because 母 is the topic we're commenting about, not the subject being emphasized.
wrong_choice_explanations.を: を marks direct objects — it doesn't fit here because 母 is not being acted upon by a verb.
wrong_choice_explanations.に: に indicates direction or location — it doesn't fit here because we're not expressing movement toward or position of the mother.
